title: Implement structured deal math and show UI updates
summary: Implemented structured recoup clauses, vs/net deal math, tier ratchets, and recoup waterfall in dealMath.ts with tests and schema migration. Updated settlement and /shows/[id] UI to render recoup summaries, ratchet bands, comp dollar values, deal formulas, and live-math variance. Reseeded DB, addressed code review feedback (flat-deal comment, warn on unknown categories), and confirmed lifecycle states remain presentation-only.
